generated_oml:
// Environment
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure (Living Lab academic building) with geometry, spatial relationships and building services represented in a BIM model."
    , base:contains OccupancySensor
    , base:contains IlluminationSensor
    , base:contains TemperatureSensor
    , base:contains EnergyMeterSensor
    , base:contains LightingActuator
    , base:contains HVACValveActuator
    , base:contains BuildingInformationModel
    , base:contains DeviceMetadataModel
    , base:contains ControlSemanticsModel
    , base:contains RuntimeArtifactsModel
]

// Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor embedded in the Living Lab building that detects occupancy levels, configured in the enriched BIM model and streams measurements via Eclipse Hono."
    , DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTx
]

instance IlluminationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring indoor illumination, configured in the BIM model and streamed in real time."
    , DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminationDataTx
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring indoor temperature, configured in the BIM model and streamed via Eclipse Hono."
    , DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTx
]

instance EnergyMeterSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meter sensor capturing electricity consumption of building services, configured in BIM and streamed to the twin."
    , DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTx
]

// Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance IlluminationDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminationSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeterSensor
]

// Data
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy measurement data streamed from OccupancySensor."
    , DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTx
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinState
]

instance IlluminationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Illumination measurement data streamed from IlluminationSensor."
    , DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminationDataTx
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinState
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurement data streamed from TemperatureSensor."
    , DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTx
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinState
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Energy consumption data streamed from EnergyMeterSensor."
    , DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTx
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinState
]

// Models
instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model serving as the semantic backbone of the Living Lab building, enriched with device metadata and control semantics."
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model containing metadata of all sensing and acting devices embedded in the building."
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance ControlSemanticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model defining control semantics for actuators such as lighting and HVAC."
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance RuntimeArtifactsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model‑driven generated runtime artifacts (e.g., configuration files) for Hono and Ditto deployment."
    , DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

// Enablers
instance HonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware providing MQTT‑based ingestion of sensor data from the physical building."
]

instance DittoTwinState : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto managing digital twin state, receiving data streams and storing live sensor data."
    , DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService
    , DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
    , DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    , DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 delivering immersive 3‑D visualization of the building twin."
    , DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven engineering pipeline that validates enriched BIM, auto‑generates configurations, and supports modular twin evolution."
    , DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    , DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools used to create and enrich the building information model."
]

// Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling lighting fixtures in the building, modeled in BIM and addressable by the twin for command issuance."
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC valve actuator regulating heating, ventilation and air‑conditioning flows, modeled in BIM and controllable via the twin."
]

// Services
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3‑D visualization service delivered via Unreal Engine 5."
    , DTDFVocab:provides VisualDecisionSupportInsight
]

instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard service presenting live sensor data to facility managers."
    , DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service that forecasts occupancy, temperature, and energy usage."
    , DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service that runs building performance models to evaluate energy consumption and comfort."
    , DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service that generates recommendations to reduce energy consumption while maintaining occupant comfort."
    , DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
    , DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

// Insights
instance VisualDecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visual decision‑support dashboards that help facility managers explore twin states."
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live insight into occupancy, illumination, temperature, and energy metrics for operational awareness."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics outcomes offering forecasts of building performance and occupant behavior."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for energy consumption and occupant comfort without direct actuation."
]

instance PerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results showing building performance under various scenarios."
]

// Actions
instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action representing control commands to lighting and HVAC actuators based on optimization recommendations."
    , DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication from the twin to the building: control logic executed in the twin generates command messages that are sent through Ditto and Eclipse Hono back to the actuators in the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Near‑real‑time synchronization, with sensor updates and control commands exchanged continuously at sub‑second to second intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular architecture where the DT framework acts as a central hub: enriched BIM models are transformed into runtime artifacts, Hono ingests sensor streams, Ditto maintains twin state, and Unreal Engine visualises the twin; extension points allow additional services to be plugged in."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin spans the full building lifecycle: design (BIM creation), construction (device configuration), operation (continuous monitoring and control), and refurbishment/adaptation phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to quantify how closely the twin reflects its physical counterpart, providing a measure of fidelity and guiding validation efforts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real‑time data exchange is realized through the Eclipse Hono middleware coupled with Eclipse Ditto, enabling continuous bidirectional communication between physical devices and the digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The approach relies on BIM standards for semantic consistency and defines standardized extension points to ensure interoperable, service‑oriented digital twin components."
]
